planets.name: Lol
planets.summary: Archive cluster around lol: 250 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Lol receipt from 2024-07-09
artifacts.excerpt:
we went back to look through the answers, everyone else had done an O(n) for-loop implementation

“wtf did you use DP? how was yours so much faster?”

they looked at my soln, paused, thought through for a sec, and let out an “…ohhh”

i had literally zero clue what DP meant LOL
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: lol, actually, defenderofbasic, feel.

artifacts.title: Lol receipt from 2025-07-17
artifacts.excerpt:
hi friends 
ive been away and then lurking for some time, but im back now :)

some news on my front — my gf and i have broken up. im doing alright, ill explain what happened at some point but rn im just annoyed w the thought of having to explain to all my friends and family lol

artifacts.title: Lol receipt from 2026-06-19
artifacts.excerpt: It’s fun practice for future me too tbh. I’ve been enjoying redirecting my parents when they’re exhausted after having walked the whole day; stay positive, empathize with them, distract them, keep them informed on what the next plan is and how we’re getting there, toss them little challenges and quizzes along the way, and spring forward a surprise here and there. Fun practice to eventually be a dad one day lol

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2024-07-09
artifacts.excerpt:
the pattern was pretty obvious to me — it should always return n squared! i wrote it down, submitted, and my O(1) solution took less time/space than like 99.9% of runs

it was so obvious i didn’t even give it a second thought, i figured everyone did it the same way and moved on
